name: Ricki Kohli
bio: Ricki brings sharp market instincts and a client-first approach to every deal. With deep roots in the Greater Vancouver market, he specializes in identifying high-value opportunities for buyers and investors across BC's most competitive neighbourhoods.

name: Amit Khatkar
bio: Born and raised in Victoria BC, Amit is the founder of SAGA Homes Group and an award-winning REALTOR® with eXp Realty. His expertise in social media marketing, advanced advertising strategies, and deep knowledge of the Vancouver Island market delivers an experience like no other for buyers and sellers.

name: Gary Doman
bio: Gary is the architect behind the RAG Command Center — the real estate intelligence platform powering the team's data-driven edge. He designed and built the deal scoring engine, multi-source reconciliation pipeline, GPS mapping system, and signal detection engine from the ground up. Every listing the team works passes through systems he created.
